---
title: ""
format:
  docx:
    reference-doc: resume-reference.docx
    toc: false
---

::: {custom-style="ResumeName"}
**Alex Rivera-Santos**
:::

::: {custom-style="ResumeContact"}
\(555\) 342-7819 | [ariveras@northgate.edu](mailto:ariveras@northgate.edu) | [linkedin.com/in/alex-rivera-santos](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alex-rivera-santos)
:::

# EDUCATION

| **Northgate University of Technology** | Millbrook, OH |
| --- | ---: |
| *Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science* | August 2021 -- Present |
| *Doctor of Philosophy in Machine Learning* |  |

| **Clearwater State University** | Clearwater, TX |
| --- | ---: |
| *College of Engineering* | August 2017 -- May 2021 |
| *Bachelor of Science, Computer Engineering, Summa Cum Laude* |  |

# PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

| **Northgate University of Technology -- Adaptive Systems Lab** | Millbrook, OH |
| --- | ---: |
| *Graduate Research Assistant* | August 2021 -- Present |

- Designed and implemented novel safe reinforcement learning algorithms for autonomous aerial vehicles
- Deployed real-time control policies on embedded hardware platforms under strict computational constraints
- Published and presented research at top-tier conferences and journals in machine learning and robotics
- Advised by Dr. Priya Nair

| **Northgate University of Technology** | Millbrook, OH |
| --- | ---: |
| *Teaching Assistant, Foundations of Machine Learning* | January 2022 -- May 2023 |

- Assisted professor with course instruction for a cohort of 120 graduate students
- Hosted weekly office hours and review sessions in preparation for exams and assignments
- Graded homeworks, exams, and programming projects covering supervised and unsupervised learning

| **Clearwater State University -- Embedded Systems Lab** | Clearwater, TX |
| --- | ---: |
| *Research Assistant* | November 2019 -- May 2021 |

- Developed low-level firmware for sensor fusion on constrained microcontroller platforms
- Contributed to original research on energy-efficient path planning for ground vehicles
- Advised by Dr. Marcus Delgado

# LEADERSHIP AND SERVICE

| **Latin American Engineering Society -- Northgate University of Technology** | Millbrook, OH |
| --- | ---: |
| *Co-Founder and President* | September 2022 -- Present |

- Assembled a four-member founding board and secured a faculty advisor and university departmental sponsorship
- Raised operating funds and recruited members from across the College of Engineering
- Organized professional development workshops, cultural events, and networking sessions with industry partners
